high.label: HIGH
checklist_items: Security implications reviewed (injection, privilege escalation, data exposure)
Backward compatibility confirmed or breakage documented
Rollback plan documented if deployment risk exists
Tests cover happy path AND failure paths

medium.label: MEDIUM
checklist_items: Logic changes have corresponding test updates
Error handling covers expected failure modes
No unintended side effects on adjacent modules
Config changes are backward compatible or migration provided
Performance impact assessed for hot paths

low.label: LOW
checklist_items: No accidental debug or placeholder content

auto_verifiable.test_pass: Run: bash run_tests.sh or npm test
auto_verifiable.no_secrets: Checked by: git-secrets or trufflehog scan
